verses.latin_vulgate: Et factus est sermo Domini ad me, dicens :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֥י דְבַר־יְהֹוָ֖ה אֵלַ֥י לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.king_james: Moreover the word of the Lord came unto me, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Et tu, fili hominis, hæc dicit Dominus Deus terræ Israël :   Finis venit : venit finis super quatuor plagas terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתָּ֣ה בֶן־אָדָ֗ם כֹּֽה־אָמַ֞ר אֲדֹנָ֧י יֱהֹוִ֛ה לְאַדְמַ֥ת יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל קֵ֑ץ בָּ֣א הַקֵּ֔ץ עַל־[אַרְבַּ֖ע] (ארבעת) כַּנְפ֥וֹת הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Also, thou son of man, thus saith the Lord God unto the land of Israel; An end, the end is come upon the four corners of the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc finis super te, et immittam furorem meum in te :  et judicabo te juxta vias tuas,  et ponam contra te omnes abominationes tuas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַתָּה֙ הַקֵּ֣ץ עָלַ֔יִךְ וְשִׁלַּחְתִּ֤י אַפִּי֙ בָּ֔ךְ וּשְׁפַטְתִּ֖יךְ כִּדְרָכָ֑יִךְ וְנָתַתִּ֣י עָלַ֔יִךְ אֵ֖ת כׇּל־תּוֹעֲבוֹתָֽיִךְ׃
verses.king_james: Now is the end come upon thee, and I will send mine anger upon thee, and will judge thee according to thy ways, and will recompense upon thee all thine abominations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et non parcet oculus meus super te, et non miserebor :  sed vias tuas ponam super te, et abominationes tuæ in medio tui erunt,  et scietis quia ego Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־תָח֥וֹס עֵינִ֛י עָלַ֖יִךְ וְלֹ֣א אֶחְמ֑וֹל כִּ֣י דְרָכַ֜יִךְ עָלַ֣יִךְ אֶתֵּ֗ן וְתוֹעֲבוֹתַ֙יִךְ֙ בְּתוֹכֵ֣ךְ תִּֽהְיֶ֔יןָ וִידַעְתֶּ֖ם כִּי־אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And mine eye shall not spare thee, neither will I have pity: but I will recompense thy ways upon thee, and thine abominations shall be in the midst of thee: and ye shall know that I am the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus Deus :  Afflictio una, afflictio ecce venit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֥ה אָמַ֖ר אֲדֹנָ֣י יֱהֹוִ֑ה רָעָ֛ה אַחַ֥ת רָעָ֖ה הִנֵּ֥ה בָאָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord God; An evil, an only evil, behold, is come.

verses.latin_vulgate: Finis venit, venit finis :  evigilavit adversum te, ecce venit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קֵ֣ץ בָּ֔א בָּ֥א הַקֵּ֖ץ הֵקִ֣יץ אֵלָ֑יִךְ הִנֵּ֖ה בָּאָֽה׃
verses.king_james: An end is come, the end is come: it watcheth for thee; behold, it is come.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venit contritio super te, qui habitas in terra :  venit tempus, prope est dies occisionis,  et non gloriæ montium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּ֧אָה הַצְּפִירָ֛ה אֵלֶ֖יךָ יוֹשֵׁ֣ב הָאָ֑רֶץ בָּ֣א הָעֵ֗ת קָר֛וֹב הַיּ֥וֹם מְהוּמָ֖ה וְלֹא־הֵ֥ד הָרִֽים׃
verses.king_james: The morning is come unto thee, O thou that dwellest in the land: the time is come, the day of trouble is near, and not the sounding again of the mountains.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nunc de propinquo effundam iram meam super te,  et complebo furorem meum in te :  et judicabo te juxta vias tuas,  et imponam tibi omnia scelera tua,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַתָּ֣ה מִקָּר֗וֹב אֶשְׁפּ֤וֹךְ חֲמָתִי֙ עָלַ֔יִךְ וְכִלֵּיתִ֤י אַפִּי֙ בָּ֔ךְ וּשְׁפַטְתִּ֖יךְ כִּדְרָכָ֑יִךְ וְנָתַתִּ֣י עָלַ֔יִךְ אֵ֖ת כׇּל־תּוֹעֲבוֹתָֽיִךְ׃
verses.king_james: Now will I shortly pour out my fury upon thee, and accomplish mine anger upon thee: and I will judge thee according to thy ways, and will recompense thee for all thine abominations.

verses.latin_vulgate: et non parcet oculus meus,  nec miserebor :  sed vias tuas imponam tibi,  et abominationes tuæ in medio tui erunt,  et scietis quia ego sum Dominus percutiens.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־תָח֥וֹס עֵינִ֖י וְלֹ֣א אֶחְמ֑וֹל כִּדְרָכַ֜יִךְ עָלַ֣יִךְ אֶתֵּ֗ן וְתוֹעֲבוֹתַ֙יִךְ֙ בְּתוֹכֵ֣ךְ תִּהְיֶ֔יןָ וִידַעְתֶּ֕ם כִּ֛י אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה מַכֶּֽה׃
verses.king_james: And mine eye shall not spare, neither will I have pity: I will recompense thee according to thy ways and thine abominations that are in the midst of thee; and ye shall know that I am the Lord that smiteth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce dies, ecce venit :  egressa est contritio,  floruit virga, germinavit superbia,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֥ה הַיּ֖וֹם הִנֵּ֣ה בָאָ֑ה יָֽצְאָה֙ הַצְּפִרָ֔ה צָ֚ץ הַמַּטֶּ֔ה פָּרַ֖ח הַזָּדֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: Behold the day, behold, it is come: the morning is gone forth; the rod hath blossomed, pride hath budded.

verses.latin_vulgate: iniquitas surrexit in virga impietatis :  non ex eis, et non ex populo,  neque ex sonitu eorum :  et non erit requies in eis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֶחָמָ֥ס ׀ קָ֖ם לְמַטֵּה־רֶ֑שַׁע לֹא־מֵהֶ֞ם וְלֹ֧א מֵהֲמוֹנָ֛ם וְלֹ֥א מֶהֱמֵהֶ֖ם וְלֹא־נֹ֥הַּ בָּהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: Violence is risen up into a rod of wickedness: none of them shall remain, nor of their multitude, nor of any of theirs: neither shall there be wailing for them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venit tempus, appropinquavit dies :  qui emit, non lætetur,  et qui vendit, non lugeat :  quia ira super omnem populum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּ֤א הָעֵת֙ הִגִּ֣יעַ הַיּ֔וֹם הַקּוֹנֶה֙ אַל־יִשְׂמָ֔ח וְהַמֹּכֵ֖ר אַל־יִתְאַבָּ֑ל כִּ֥י חָר֖וֹן אֶל־כׇּל־הֲמוֹנָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: The time is come, the day draweth near: let not the buyer rejoice, nor the seller mourn: for wrath is upon all the multitude thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia qui vendit, ad id quod vendidit non revertetur :  et adhuc in viventibus vita eorum :  visio enim ad omnem multitudinem ejus non regredietur,  et vir in iniquitate vitæ suæ non confortabitur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י הַמֹּכֵ֗ר אֶל־הַמִּמְכָּר֙ לֹ֣א יָשׁ֔וּב וְע֥וֹד בַּחַיִּ֖ים חַיָּתָ֑ם כִּֽי־חָז֤וֹן אֶל־כׇּל־הֲמוֹנָהּ֙ לֹ֣א יָשׁ֔וּב וְאִ֧ישׁ בַּעֲוֺנ֛וֹ חַיָּת֖וֹ לֹ֥א יִתְחַזָּֽקוּ׃
verses.king_james: For the seller shall not return to that which is sold, although they were yet alive: for the vision is touching the whole multitude thereof, which shall not return; neither shall any strengthen himself in the iniquity of his life.

verses.latin_vulgate: Canite tuba, præparentur omnes :  et non est qui vadat ad prælium :  ira enim mea super universum populum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תָּקְע֤וּ בַתָּק֙וֹעַ֙ וְהָכִ֣ין הַכֹּ֔ל וְאֵ֥ין הֹלֵ֖ךְ לַמִּלְחָמָ֑ה כִּ֥י חֲרוֹנִ֖י אֶל־כׇּל־הֲמוֹנָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: They have blown the trumpet, even to make all ready; but none goeth to the battle: for my wrath is upon all the multitude thereof.

verses.latin_vulgate: Gladium foris, et pestis et fames intrinsecus :  qui in agro est, gladio morietur,  et qui in civitate, pestilentia et fame devorabuntur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַחֶ֣רֶב בַּח֔וּץ וְהַדֶּ֥בֶר וְהָרָעָ֖ב מִבָּ֑יִת אֲשֶׁ֤ר בַּשָּׂדֶה֙ בַּחֶ֣רֶב יָמ֔וּת וַאֲשֶׁ֣ר בָּעִ֔יר רָעָ֥ב וָדֶ֖בֶר יֹאכְלֶֽנּוּ׃
verses.king_james: The sword is without, and the pestilence and the famine within: he that is in the field shall die with the sword; and he that is in the city, famine and pestilence shall devour him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et salvabuntur qui fugerint ex eis :  et erunt in montibus quasi columbæ convallium omnes trepidi,  unusquisque in iniquitate sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּפָֽלְטוּ֙ פְּלִ֣יטֵיהֶ֔ם וְהָי֣וּ אֶל־הֶהָרִ֗ים כְּיוֹנֵ֧י הַגֵּאָי֛וֹת כֻּלָּ֖ם הֹמ֑וֹת אִ֖ישׁ בַּעֲוֺנֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: But they that escape of them shall escape, and shall be on the mountains like doves of the valleys, all of them mourning, every one for his iniquity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes manus dissolventur,  et omnia genua fluent aquis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כׇּל־הַיָּדַ֖יִם תִּרְפֶּ֑ינָה וְכׇל־בִּרְכַּ֖יִם תֵּלַ֥כְנָה מָּֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: All hands shall be feeble, and all knees shall be weak as water.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et accingent se ciliciis,  et operiet eos formido :  et in omni facie confusio,  et in universis capitibus eorum calvitium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְחָגְר֣וּ שַׂקִּ֔ים וְכִסְּתָ֥ה אוֹתָ֖ם פַּלָּצ֑וּת וְאֶ֤ל כׇּל־פָּנִים֙ בּוּשָׁ֔ה וּבְכׇל־רָאשֵׁיהֶ֖ם קׇרְחָֽה׃
verses.king_james: They shall also gird themselves with sackcloth, and horror shall cover them; and shame shall be upon all faces, and baldness upon all their heads.

verses.latin_vulgate: Argentum eorum foras projicietur,  et aurum eorum in sterquilinium erit :  argentum eorum et aurum eorum  non valebit liberare eos in die furoris Domini :  animam suam non saturabunt,  et ventres eorum non implebuntur,  quia scandalum iniquitatis eorum factum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּסְפָּ֞ם בַּחוּצ֣וֹת יַשְׁלִ֗יכוּ וּזְהָבָם֮ לְנִדָּ֣ה יִֽהְיֶה֒ כַּסְפָּ֨ם וּזְהָבָ֜ם לֹא־יוּכַ֣ל לְהַצִּילָ֗ם בְּיוֹם֙ עֶבְרַ֣ת יְהֹוָ֔ה נַפְשָׁם֙ לֹ֣א יְשַׂבֵּ֔עוּ וּמֵעֵיהֶ֖ם לֹ֣א יְמַלֵּ֑אוּ כִּֽי־מִכְשׁ֥וֹל עֲוֺנָ֖ם הָיָֽה׃
verses.king_james: They shall cast their silver in the streets, and their gold shall be removed: their silver and their gold shall not be able to deliver them in the day of the wrath of the Lord: they shall not satisfy their souls, neither fill their bowels: because it is the stumblingblock of their iniquity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ornamentum monilium suorum in superbiam posuerunt,  et imagines abominationum suarum et simulacrorum fecerunt ex eo :  propter hoc dedi eis illud in immunditiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּצְבִ֤י עֶדְיוֹ֙ לְגָא֣וֹן שָׂמָ֔הוּ וְצַלְמֵ֧י תוֹעֲבֹתָ֛ם שִׁקּוּצֵיהֶ֖ם עָ֣שׂוּ ב֑וֹ עַל־כֵּ֛ן נְתַתִּ֥יו לָהֶ֖ם לְנִדָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: As for the beauty of his ornament, he set it in majesty: but they made the images of their abominations and of their detestable things therein: therefore have I set it far from them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dabo illud in manus alienorum ad diripiendum,  et impiis terræ in prædam,  et contaminabunt illud.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּנְתַתִּ֤יו בְּיַֽד־הַזָּרִים֙ לָבַ֔ז וּלְרִשְׁעֵ֥י הָאָ֖רֶץ לְשָׁלָ֑ל (וחללוה) [וְחִלְּלֽוּהוּ]׃
verses.king_james: And I will give it into the hands of the strangers for a prey, and to the wicked of the earth for a spoil; and they shall pollute it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et avertam faciem meam ab eis,  et violabunt arcanum meum :  et introibunt in illud emissarii,  et contaminabunt illud.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַהֲסִבּוֹתִ֤י פָנַי֙ מֵהֶ֔ם וְחִלְּל֖וּ אֶת־צְפוּנִ֑י וּבָאוּ־בָ֥הּ פָּרִיצִ֖ים וְחִלְּלֽוּהָ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: My face will I turn also from them, and they shall pollute my secret place: for the robbers shall enter into it, and defile it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fac conclusionem,  quoniam terra plena est judicio sanguinum,  et civitas plena iniquitate.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֲשֵׂ֖ה הָרַתּ֑וֹק כִּ֣י הָאָ֗רֶץ מָֽלְאָה֙ מִשְׁפַּ֣ט דָּמִ֔ים וְהָעִ֖יר מָלְאָ֥ה חָמָֽס׃
verses.king_james: Make a chain: for the land is full of bloody crimes, and the city is full of violence.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et adducam pessimos de gentibus,  et possidebunt domos eorum :  et quiescere faciam superbiam potentium,  et possidebunt sanctuaria eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֵֽבֵאתִי֙ רָעֵ֣י גוֹיִ֔ם וְיָרְשׁ֖וּ אֶת־בָּתֵּיהֶ֑ם וְהִשְׁבַּתִּי֙ גְּא֣וֹן עַזִּ֔ים וְנִחֲל֖וּ מְקַֽדְשֵׁיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: Wherefore I will bring the worst of the heathen, and they shall possess their houses: I will also make the pomp of the strong to cease; and their holy places shall be defiled.

verses.latin_vulgate: Angustia superveniente, requirent pacem,  et non erit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: קְפָ֖דָה־בָ֑א וּבִקְשׁ֥וּ שָׁל֖וֹם וָאָֽיִן׃
verses.king_james: Destruction cometh; and they shall seek peace, and there shall be none.

verses.latin_vulgate: Conturbatio super conturbationem veniet,  et auditus super auditum :  et quærent visionem de propheta,  et lex peribit a sacerdote,  et consilium a senioribus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֹוָ֤ה עַל־הֹוָה֙ תָּב֔וֹא וּשְׁמֻעָ֥ה אֶל־שְׁמוּעָ֖ה תִּֽהְיֶ֑ה וּבִקְשׁ֤וּ חָזוֹן֙ מִנָּבִ֔יא וְתוֹרָה֙ תֹּאבַ֣ד מִכֹּהֵ֔ן וְעֵצָ֖ה מִזְּקֵנִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Mischief shall come upon mischief, and rumour shall be upon rumour; then shall they seek a vision of the prophet; but the law shall perish from the priest, and counsel from the ancients.

verses.latin_vulgate: Rex lugebit, et princeps induetur mœrore,  et manus populi terræ conturbabuntur :  secundum viam eorum faciam eis,  et secundum judicia eorum judicabo eos,  et scient quia ego Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַמֶּ֣לֶךְ יִתְאַבָּ֗ל וְנָשִׂיא֙ יִלְבַּ֣שׁ שְׁמָמָ֔ה וִידֵ֥י עַם־הָאָ֖רֶץ תִּבָּהַ֑לְנָה מִדַּרְכָּ֞ם אֶעֱשֶׂ֤ה אֹתָם֙ וּבְמִשְׁפְּטֵיהֶ֣ם אֶשְׁפְּטֵ֔ם וְיָדְע֖וּ כִּֽי־אֲנִ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: The king shall mourn, and the prince shall be clothed with desolation, and the hands of the people of the land shall be troubled: I will do unto them after their way, and according to their deserts will I judge them; and they shall know that I am the Lord.
